headline: Barret Zoph is out at OpenAI again after just five months
summary: Barret Zoph, head of enterprise AI sales, has departed OpenAI after a brief five-month return. Zoph previously co-founded Thinking Machines Lab, a competing AI company. This marks his second exit from OpenAI.

headline: Valve is so behind on Steam Controller orders that some won't ship until 2027
summary: Valve is experiencing severe delays in shipping Steam Controllers. New reservations show estimated delivery dates as late as 2027. Buyers are offered three delivery windows: Sep 2026, Dec 2026, or sometime in 2027.

headline: You can now use the Game Boy Camera with your phone
summary: The $50 GB Operator accessory now enables Game Boy Camera use with phones. It connects Game Boy, Color, and Advance cartridges to various devices. This expands on its previous functionality as a desktop webcam.

headline: HBO Max's annual plans are 28 percent off right now
summary: HBO Max is offering 28% off its annual subscription plans. The promotion runs until July 15, 2026, for new and returning subscribers. The ad-supported tier now costs $78.99, saving subscribers $31.

headline: Darth Maul Voice Actor Slams Star Wars: The Phantom Menace as 'The Biggest Disappointment of My Life' and Says His Pay Was 'S***'
summary: Peter Serafinowicz, Darth Maul's voice actor, called The Phantom Menace his "biggest disappointment." He openly criticized the film and his "s***" pay for the role. His comments add to the debate around the divisive prequel.

headline: Fallout Season 3 Adds Star Wars and The Good Place Star Manny Jacinto
summary: Manny Jacinto joins the cast for Fallout TV series Season 3. Jacinto is known for roles in "Star Wars: The Acolyte" and "The Good Place." His addition follows the success of Prime Video's hit show.

headline: Cape Fear Episode 4 Review - 'Pierced'
summary: "Cape Fear" Episode 4, titled "Pierced," delivers a moody slow-burn narrative. The episode features sudden bursts of violence. A jaw-dropping family revelation for Max Cady highlights the review.

headline: Sugar Season 2 Review
summary: "Sugar Season 2" review focuses on Colin Farrell's performance. The Apple TV series is described with "close encounters of the kind eyes." This is a concise summary of the show's second season.

headline: Chris Mason: Emphatic win leaves Starmer with big decision on leadership
summary: Andy Burnham secured an emphatic victory, impacting Labour leadership dynamics. The Prime Minister will observe the scale of Burnham's success. The win may challenge Starmer's current stance and defiance.

headline: What is Burnham's path to becoming Labour leader and PM?
summary: The article explores Andy Burnham's potential route to Labour leadership. It discusses how MPs could trigger a leadership contest against Sir Keir Starmer. The piece also considers who else might contend for the position.

headline: Scottish Conservatives win first Westminster by-election in more than 50 years
summary: Scottish Conservatives won a Westminster by-election in Aberdeen South. This marks their first such victory in over 50 years. The SNP also secured wins in Arbroath and Broughty Ferry.

headline: Sir John Curtice: Burnham's win against Reform represents remarkable personal success
summary: Andy Burnham's victory against Reform is deemed a remarkable personal success. He not only retained Labour's vote share from 2024 but increased it. Sir John Curtice highlights the significance of this electoral achievement.
